headlines.title: Supreme Court temporarily extends full access to abortion pill while it mulls legal challenge
headlines.description: The justices are still considering what next steps to take in a case that could block availability of the abortion pill mifepristone by mail.

headlines.title: Hungry children, canceled benefits: Arizona’s food stamp cuts are a warning for America
headlines.description: Under President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” food stamp applicants are fighting to prove eligibility. A crisis in Arizona offers a warning for America.

headlines.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'on massive life support'
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters the Iranian response to a U.S. peace proposal was “stupid” and that the ceasefire is “on massive life support.” NBC News' Jon Allen reports on the war's impasse and how Trump responded to questions over his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping later in the week.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: The fight is on over tickets to the White House UFC fight
headlines.description: The White House will host the first ever UFC fight on the South Lawn as part of the America's 250th birthday celebrations, setting up a push among MMA fans and MAGA supporters to get tickets. NBC News’ Jonathan Allen reports that President Donald Trump will handpick a lot of the 4,000 attendants, while the public will be able to watch a broadcast of the fight on the Ellipse.

headlines.title: Officials give update after Americans aboard hontavirus-hit cruise hit return to U.S.
headlines.description: Health officials provided an update from Omaha, Nebraska, after most of the American passengers aboard the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship Hondius arrived there for medical treatment. NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian reports on the steps being taken by health officials to ensure containment, as well as the status of the ship itself, which is anchored in Spain.

headlines.title: Timelapse shows start of 'midnight sun' season in Alaska
headlines.description: Timelapse shows start of 'midnight sun' season in Alaska

headlines.title: Where hantavirus cruise ship passengers are staying in Nebraska
headlines.description: Americans from the hantavirus cruise ship are being assessed and monitored at the National Quarantine Unit in Nebraska. NBC News' Camila Bernal reports on where the passengers are staying.

headlines.title: Papa John's offers pizzas to Spirit rewards members
headlines.description: Papa John's offers pizzas to Spirit rewards members

headlines.description: Trump: Ceasefire with Iran is 'on massive life support'

headlines.title: Hondius captain posts message of gratitude
headlines.description: Hondius captain posts message of gratitude

headlines.title: Birthright citizenship battle looks to century-old case
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s executive order challenges the long-standing interpretation of birthright citizenship, arguing it should not apply to children of undocumented immigrants. NBC News’ Laura Jarrett speaks with Lucy Salyer, history professor at University of New Hampshire along with a descendant of Wong Kim Ark — the man behind the landmark 1898 Supreme Court case that solidified birthright citizenship in America — about the broader message it sends if the DOJ succeeds in ending bir
